Off Calendar Aug-04-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kimberly Gates, Esq. (510-848-8880) of The Chanler Group for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment, as to defendant Spectrum Brands, Inc. is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and Judgment are signed.
Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
